content.text:
*exhales slowly*

A lot. It costs a lot.

I'm exhausted a lot of the time and I don't always know why. And I'm — I'm good at my job, I know I'm good at my job, but the moment my boss walks in the room I can't access that. It's like... all my competence just goes somewhere I can't reach it. And then afterward I'm furious at myself, because I know what happened but I couldn't stop it.

And I think — *pauses* — I think it costs me in relationships too. The tracking thing. People feel it. Like I'm always slightly... braced. Even when there's no reason to be.

*shorter pause*

Yeah. A lot.
